title: Maisto Mini Working Machines MASSEY FERGUSSON 8S.265 TRACTOR WITH BALER TRAILER – 3” – Incredibly Detailed Die-Cast Replica Collectible Model, Assorted Models, Red
features: Marvel in the authenticity and details of this realistic reproduction of a classic farm construction vehicle. An officially licensed model with exceptional accuracy where no detail is overlooked.
Manufactured from diecast Zinc alloy and finely detailed resin. Sits on chunky, smooth rolling rubber tyres. Beautifully modeled cabs and working parts and accessories.

Behold the intricate detail, realism and real-life accuracy of this incredible replica. Enjoy the astonishing graphics and high-quality paint finishes of this unique vehicle. Proudly display it in any collection.
This model is possibly the perfect size to display its amazing details, the truck is approximately 10cm (3 inches) long plus the accessory.

Child safe and uses non-toxic paints and finishes. Meets and exceeds all UK, EU and US product testing standards. A perfect gift for any farm and construction vehicle enthusiast and collector. Appropriate for ages 3 +.
description: Product Description 3-inch diecast officially licensed Massey Ferguson 8S.265 tractor with free-rolling wheels. The attention to detail on each is incredible, with chunky wheels, mud guards and cabs that look just like the real thing. Includes a baler trailer accessory. Discover the exquisite world of Maisto Die-Cast Vehicle Model Collectibles, where precision meets passion. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, these miniature marvels are a testament to automotive artistry. From iconic sports cars and classic vintage beauties to construction trucks and emergency vehicles, each model is a masterpiece in its own right. The entire range consists of incredibly detailed replicas with free spinning rubber wheels and accurate moving parts. Whether you're a die-hard collector, an admirer of fine craftsmanship or simply looking for a new addition to the toy chest with great play value, Maisto's range offers something for every enthusiast. Elevate your collection with these stunning, authentic replicas, and let your love for automobiles shine through every meticulously sculpted curve and line. Maisto is brought to you by One For Fun Toys, an industry leading manufacturer and distributor of toys, impulse items and collectibles. For almost 50 years we have offered high-quality, innovative and safe products that engage and enthrall children and adults alike. We strive to promote creativity, discovery, entertainment and imagination with products designed to delight and engineered to endure. From Impulse to Games, Plush to Outdoor, Figurines to Playsets. Along with Bburago, One For Fun offers Tobar and HGL toys, OzBozz Ride-ons and Bburago Collectible Diecast Models. Safety Warning Small parts, chocking hazzard
